user.title: Set up Advanced History
user.description: Create a configurable History sidebar panel powered by Statistics Graph Chart Card.

data.title: Panel title
data.redirect_show_more: Open Show more in Advanced History

data_description.redirect_show_more: Redirect the History section's Show more link in entity dialogs to Advanced History, replacing all existing targets with that entity.
data_description.card_options: Default Statistics Graph Chart Card settings for new charts. Edit the YAML directly or use the Open visual editor button below it.
data_description.card_module_url: Leave empty to auto-detect the Statistics Graph Chart Card HACS resource.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Advanced History
reconfigure.description: Update the sidebar panel and graph defaults. Saving reloads Advanced History automatically.

data.title: Panel title
data.redirect_show_more: Open Show more in Advanced History

data_description.redirect_show_more: Redirect the History section's Show more link in entity dialogs to Advanced History, replacing all existing targets with that entity.
data_description.card_module_url: Leave empty to auto-detect the Statistics Graph Chart Card HACS resource.
data_description.card_options: Default Statistics Graph Chart Card settings for new charts. Edit the YAML directly or use the Open visual editor button below it.

more_info.title: Set up More-Info
more_info.description: Create a separate service that can replace the native History graph in entity More Info dialogs.

data.replace_more_info_history: Use Statistics Graph in More Info

data_description.replace_more_info_history: Replace the native History graph in entity dialogs with Statistics Graph Chart Card.
data_description.more_info_show_date_picker: Show the Statistics Graph Chart Card's built-in date picker in entity dialogs.
data_description.card_module_url: Leave empty to auto-detect the Statistics Graph Chart Card HACS resource.
data_description.more_info_card_options: Statistics Graph Chart Card settings used only in entity dialogs. Edit the YAML directly or use the visual editor button.

reconfigure_more_info.title: Reconfigure More-Info
reconfigure_more_info.description: Update the More-Info graph replacement and its independent card defaults.

data.replace_more_info_history: Use Statistics Graph in More Info

data_description.replace_more_info_history: Replace the native History graph in entity dialogs with Statistics Graph Chart Card.
data_description.more_info_show_date_picker: Show the Statistics Graph Chart Card's built-in date picker in entity dialogs.
data_description.card_module_url: Leave empty to auto-detect the Statistics Graph Chart Card HACS resource.
data_description.more_info_card_options: Statistics Graph Chart Card settings used only in entity dialogs. Edit the YAML directly or use the visual editor button.

init.title: Advanced History settings
init.description: Saving reloads the panel automatically; Home Assistant does not need to restart.

data.title: Panel title
data.redirect_show_more: Open Show more in Advanced History
data.replace_more_info_history: Use Statistics Graph in More Info

data_description.redirect_show_more: Redirect the History section's Show more link in entity dialogs to Advanced History, replacing all existing targets with that entity.
